subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted. Verily, thou art right in having sought permission to attain Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید حق با شماست اذن حضور خواسته
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @review of publications
